title: message_query precondition returns ClientError::Parse
description: methods.rs message_query() validates that at least one of chat_id or has_mention is provided, then returns Err(ClientError::Parse(...)) on violation. Parse conventionally means 'the server sent something malformed.' A client-side precondition failure should use a different variant (e.g. ClientError::InvalidArgument) or the error message should make it unambiguous that this is a local check. A contributor seeing Parse in error handling would assume the failure came from deserializing a server response, not from their own call site.
